name: OriginLab
description: OriginLab is a useful analysis surface inside Chemistry.
whyUseIt: People in Chemistry use OriginLab to make the field more visible, testable, collaborative, or operational.
beginnerMistakes: Using OriginLab as a substitute for thinking instead of a way to sharpen it.
Skipping documentation and context when sharing output from OriginLab.
